design_plan: rng=42; audience=AIDA_checked; hero_lines=2.4; grid_density=grid-auto-flow:dense; labels_swept=yes; button_contrast=AA
headline: Super vs ChatGPT — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs ChatGPT. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs ChatGPT

summary: A fair, practical comparison for people deciding between ChatGPT and Super. ChatGPT is a world‑class general assistant and is rapidly adding agentic features. Super is purpose‑built for durable computer‑use workflows, with a reusable computer-use cache that makes repeated automation faster and cheaper over time.
